memoryArtifacts.headline: Sir John Morgan and King Henry VII
memoryArtifacts.description: John Morgan was created a Knight of the Holy Sepulchre (possibly c.1448). Later, when Henry Tudor was crowned King Henry VII it was of great benefit to the Morgans of Tredegar who were great supporter …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Morgan於1428年出生在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾特雷德爾 曼諾 在 代福瑞時，他的父親Sir Jeven Leuan Morgan24歲，母親Denise Elizabeth verch Thomas24歲。他於大約1469年與Jonet Mathew在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾馬陳結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1485年登記服兵役。他於1485年被列為sheriff of wentloog and newport; steward of the machen commote。他去世於1491年10月26日在威爾士蒙姆爾特雷德爾 曼諾 在 代福瑞享年63歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾聖 武洛斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Morgan于1428年出生在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾特雷德爾 曼諾 在 代福瑞时，他的父亲Sir Jeven Leuan Morgan24岁，母亲Denise Elizabeth verch Thomas24岁。他于大约1469年与Jonet Mathew在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾馬陳结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1485年登记服兵役。他于1485年被列为sheriff of wentloog and newport; steward of the machen commote。他去世于1491年10月26日在威尔士蒙姆爾特雷德爾 曼諾 在 代福瑞享年63岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾聖 武洛斯。

nameMeanings.name: Morgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): from the medieval Welsh personal name Morgan, Morgant (Old Welsh Morcant, of uncertain etymology).
Irish: importation of the Welsh surname (see 1 above), to which has been assimilated more than one Gaelic surname, notably Ó Muireagáin (see Merrigan ).
Scottish: probably from a Gaelic personal name cognate with Welsh Morcant.

variants.name: Merrigan
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muireagáin ‘descendant of Muireagán’ a personal name derived from muir ‘sea’. Compare Morgan , with which this name has been confused.

variants.name: Morgans
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): variant of Morgan , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Morgan was born in 1428, in Tredegyr Manor in Dyffryn, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Jeven Leuan Morgan, was 24 and his mother, Denise Elizabeth verch Thomas, was 24. He married Jonet Mathew about 1469, in Machen, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He registered for military service in 1485. In 1485, at the age of 57, his occupation is listed as sheriff of wentloog and newport; steward of the machen commote. He died on 26 October 1491, in Tredegyr Manor in Dyffryn, Monmouthshire, Wales, at the age of 63, and was buried in St Woollos, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Morgan est né en 1428, à Tredegyr Manor in Dyffryn, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Jeven Leuan Morgan, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Denise Elizabeth verch Thomas, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Jonet Mathew environ 1469, à Machen, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1485. En 1485, à l’âge de 57 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of wentloog and newport; steward of the machen commote. Il est décédé le 26 octobre 1491, à Tredegyr Manor in Dyffryn, Monmouthshire, Galles, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à St Woollos, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Morgan 1428 in Tredegyr Manor in Dyffryn, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Jeven Leuan Morgan 24 und seine Mutter Denise Elizabeth verch Thomas 24. Er hat um 1469 in Machen, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom Jonet Mathew geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1485 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1485, als er 57 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of wentloog and newport; steward of the machen commote aufgeführt. Er starb am 26. Oktober 1491 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Tredegyr Manor in Dyffryn, Monmouthshire, Wales und wurde in St Woollos, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Morgan è nato il nel 1428 nel Tredegyr Manor in Dyffryn, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Jeven Leuan Morgan, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Denise Elizabeth verch Thomas, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Jonet Mathew circa 1469, nel Machen, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1485. Nel 1485, all'età di 57 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of wentloog and newport; steward of the machen commote. Morì il 26 ottobre 1491, nel Tredegyr Manor in Dyffryn, Monmouthshire, Galles, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a St Woollos, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Morganが1428年にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアトレデグイル マノー イン ディフリンで生まれた時，父Sir Jeven Leuan Morganは24歳，母Denise Elizabeth verch Thomasは24歳であった。約1469年にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアマチェンでJonet Mathewと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1485年に兵役登録をした。1485年，57歳の時，職業はsheriff of wentloog and newport; steward of the machen commoteと記録されている。彼は1491年10月26日にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアトレデグイル マノー イン ディフリンで63歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアスト ウロスにて埋葬された。

ko.Tredegyr Manor, Dyffryn, Monmouthshire,: 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 트레데그이르 먼어 인 디프린
ko.Tredegyr Manor in Dyffryn, Monmouthshire: 웨일스 몬모우스실르 트레데그이르 먼어 인 디프린
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Morgan(이)가 1428년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 트레데그이르 먼어 인 디프린에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Jeven Leuan Morgan(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Denise Elizabeth verch Thomas(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1469년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 맥헨에서 Jonet Mathew(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1485년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1485년, 57세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of wentloog and newport; steward of the machen commote이었다. 그는 1491년 10월 26일 웨일스 몬모우스실르 트레데그이르 먼어 인 디프린에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 스트 보로스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Morgan nasceu em 1428, em Tredegyr Manor in Dyffryn, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Jeven Leuan Morgan, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Denise Elizabeth verch Thomas, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Jonet Mathew aproximadamente 1469, em Machen, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1485. Em 1485, com 57 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of wentloog and newport; steward of the machen commote. Ele faleceu em 26 de outubro de 1491, em Tredegyr Manor in Dyffryn, Monmouthshire, Gales, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em St Woollos, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.Tredegyr Manor in Dyffryn, Monmouthshire: тредегир манор ин диффрин, монмоутшир, Уэльс
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Morgan родился в 1428 г. в местности тредегир манор ин диффрин, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Jeven Leuan Morgan было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Denise Elizabeth verch Thomas, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Jonet Mathew около 1469 г. в местности мачэн, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. В 1485 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1485 году, в возрасте 57 лет, работал по профессии sheriff of wentloog and newport; steward of the machen commote. Он умер 26 октября 1491 г. в местности тредегир манор ин диффрин, монмоутшир, Уэльс в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности ст вуллос, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.Tredegyr Manor, Dyffryn, Monmouthshire,: Tredegyr Manor in Dyffryn, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido
es.Tredegyr Manor in Dyffryn, Monmouthshire: Tredegyr Manor in Dyffryn, Monmouthshire, Gales
es.St. Woollos, Monmouthshire, Wales: St Woollos, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Morgan nació en 1428, en Tredegyr Manor in Dyffryn, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Jeven Leuan Morgan, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Denise Elizabeth verch Thomas, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Jonet Mathew aproximadamente 1469, en Machen, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1485. En 1485, a la edad de 57 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of wentloog and newport; steward of the machen commote. Murió el 26 de octubre de 1491, en Tredegyr Manor in Dyffryn, Monmouthshire, Gales, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en St Woollos, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
